fields.summary: Creates a new typeface derived from this one with the specified font arguments applied.

params.args: The arguments specifying variation axis positions, palette index, and palette color overrides.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the specified customizations applied.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface derived from this one using the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette from the font's CPAL table.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> that uses the specified color palette.

fields.summary: Creates a new typeface derived from this one with the specified variation axis coordinates.

params.position: The variation axis design-space coordinates to apply.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with the given variation coordinates applied.

fields.summary: Gets a shared empty typeface instance that contains no glyphs.
fields.value: A singleton <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> with no glyph data.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with information about this typeface's variation axes.

params.axes: The span to fill with variation axis descriptors.

fields.returns: The number of axis entries written into <paramref name="axes" />.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the current variation axis coordinates for this typeface.

params.coordinates: The span to fill with axis tag-value pairs.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written into <paramref name="coordinates" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this typeface contains no glyphs.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the typeface has a glyph count of zero; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined for this typeface.
fields.value: The total number of variation axes available in the font.

fields.summary: Gets an array of descriptors for all variation axes defined for this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> structs, one per axis, or an empty array if the font is not variable.

fields.summary: Gets an array of the current variation axis coordinates for this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values, or an empty array if no variation coordinates are set.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axis coordinates currently set for this typeface.
fields.value: The count of variation axis coordinates available via <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignPosition" />.
